svg.text: "The cat sat on the mat because it was tired." → broken into tokens
each token converted to a vector of numbers representing its meaning
Transformer layers (these ARE the model weights)
every token creates 3 vectors from its embedding
Q from "it" compares against K of every token
attention scores (how well Q matched each K)
scores × V of each token → sum = updated "it" vector
each token processed individually — no cross-word lookup here
↻ repeat attention + feed forward many times
each pass builds deeper understanding — GPT-4 does this 96 times
final vectors passed through output weights → scores for every possible next token

g.text: added to input — process repeats for next token
full response built one token at a time
